author: Ron C.
pros: This software has allowed my HR personnel more ease in performing their function, including tracking leave, vacations, whose late and whose great about getting to the office in a timely maner.
cons: Nothing yet, since the agency purchased clockwise it has be very functional and user friendly

description: Our overall experience with clockwise has been very good. The knowledge of their staff is critical to our relationship as we often need things addressed in a timely urgent manner and Clockwise does just that. To be honest, some of the shortcomings of the product from our perspective our self made. We have made the system much more complicated "robust" than what I would think the typical user would need or want. I think an average user would find the product very intuitive, reliable and user friendly.
author: Rachel E.
pros: Clockwise is very forgiving. You can fix so many things with some effort. Customer Support is very good with knowledgeable staff on the other end. We have experienced VERY little downtime which is excellent.
cons: Timesheet approval status is lacking for us. Timesheet notes not visible to the end user would be very helpful but is not available. We manage many client:projects within the system with varying timesheet approval requirements which CW cannot manage so we have to extract data and manipulate in excel each week to manage our approval statuses each week.

description: Saves a lot of time and management completing timesheets and managing budgets
author: Sandy F.
pros: Simple tool for tracking time spend on individual work items
cons: Time taken to configure each project and subcode
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Our company began using Clockwise about a year ago. I find it very easy to enter my time, complete and submit my time sheet, find my leave balances, print off my W-2's, etc. It is much easier than using the paper time sheets of years ago or the Excel time sheets we used prior to Clockwise.
cons: I really can't think of anything I don't like about the software, from a user's point of view. I sometimes forget to clock in when I begin work, but that is certainly not the fault of Clockwise!

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love Clockwise most for the way that it can select the best timeslot for scheduling a flexible meeting. This has saved me HOURS of back-and-forth with planning group sessions. I also diligently review the weekly recaps that they provide, it contains quite a bit of useful information in understanding where your time went.
cons: There is not much that I dislike about Clockwise. I have heard from colleagues that they get frustrated from some of the smart features like automatically scheduled lunches and focus time but those are easily customized in the Clockwise settings so these complaints are simply due to user error.

description: Okay product not a killer. We used it as a paid product then moved to another product.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Really liked how intelligently the software moved meetings around in case someone was occupied and even recommended best time to meet! Fantastic feature.
cons: Least liked that clockwise sent unnecessary emails and notifications that didn't have any real impact like there is no meeting hence don't need to be notified.

description: Been using Clockwise since Fall 2013. Affordable timekeeping solution and very easy to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to setup new employees. Easy for entering hours worked. Fairly easy to run necessary reports. Tech support is awesome! They are always available, friendly and able to resolve any issues that need to be addressed. Tech support has helped with any kind of tracking of PTO, Vacation, Sick hours. Representatives is the best!!
cons: A little limited on reports available but their customer tech support is great! Always available, friendly and able to resolve any issues that need to be addressed.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Simple to use - nice intuitive layout on site
cons: A bit meager on design but keeps it simple.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to setup; everyone has easy access; keeps track of PTO very accurately.
cons: Difficult to link time report outputs to our Thompson Reuters myPay Solutions payroll software.

review_title: Love Clockwise to manage my day!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that Clockwise syncs with my Google Calendar as well as Slack. If I enter an Out of Office into my calendar, it automatically syncs with Slack so that I don't have to remember to change my status to away, thus saving me time! I also really like that I automatically adds focus time to my calendar, giving me time to catch up in my busy days of zoom calls and meetings.
cons: It took a few days for me to understand how to use it best and how to turn certain notifications off but so far it's been a great productivity tool for my business and my day-job!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have a dispersed employee base which at one time need time-keeping support in 7 states from Hawaii to the Virginia. Clockwise allowed us to get that function at the most cost effect price point. We are a firm that works federal contracts and the fact that Clockwise is DCAA compliant solves one of the issues with doing Cost Plus federal contracts in the future.
author: Duane N.
pros: The simple tool and it's easy access via the web was complemented by the prompt and outstanding support received when there was a need to call the HelpDesk. Whenever I needed telephonic support, the HelpDesk representative, who was extremely knowledgeable, stayed with the issue to resolution. I have to point out that almost all of my calls revolved around me enter some data or configuration incorrectly and not because of some fault with the GHG system.
cons: While the system is easy to use and gets great support, the only thing I wish was done a little better would be error diagnostic tools prior to having to call support. That would reduce the number of calls I would have had to make, even though the support was great once I did call.

description: We transitioned from outsourcing our payroll to doing inhouse payroll. Clockwise has been a good tool for our current needs. As we grow, I can see us transitioning to an integrated timekeeping/payroll system.
author: Annette G.
pros: It is very cost effective, easy to use and train employees how to use. The customer support is outstanding. Someone is always ready and available to help.
cons: Transition between our payroll and timekeeping system is cumbersome. Entering an employee in two systems is time consuming. Timesheet saving should be automatic.

review_title: My Go-To for DCAA Compliant Timekeeping
description: I have used and recommended Clockwise for several years. Our accounting group is very happy using the software.
author: Skeeter L.
pros: Easy to use, clear set up of labor categories, and establishment of groups
cons: Clear API to integrate with Quickbooks, and ability to automate labor distribution

author: Staci D.
pros: Ease of use, ease of setup, easy for employee to use and learn
cons: customer service is hard to get in touch with

review_title: Great software program to keep track of time
description: Love it! Keep up the great work.
author: Diana B.
pros: This software is easy to implement and use. The on-boarding team helped us figure out how the software works with our accounting system (Quickbooks). It saves me time and is less costly than other programs. Clockwise is also very "forgiving" with mistakes. It is easy to fix issues or mistakes. The new app for phones is very convenient too.
cons: The "Leave Request" area still has a few bugs to work out. If our employees request a solid block of time, the PTO is logged for weekends as well.

author: Harika B.
pros: I really like the integrations, able to integrate with other work apps for effective use. It is a simple plug-and-play solution to set up meetings and schedule the working hours.
cons: Setup is little confusing for a first timer.

description: We have moved on from Clockwise and discontinued its use. I only filled this out in the hope that I would cease getting emails to complete this survey.
author: Michael M.
pros: Daily time tracking was the primary use.
cons: The mobile app never worked consistently.

description: Excellent experience! I've only encountered one problem and was able to have it resolved in a timely manner. When the customer service rep needed to find out some information for me, he returned my call within minutes with the correct solutions. I value excellent customer service.
author: Denise L.
pros: The feature I like the most is the ease of the software and the ability to navigate easily between pages, tabs and fields.
cons: When you have to edit in the time keeping fields and need to type in the comment the reason why, the process would work it would work better/quicker if you could type the reason for the edit in just one field for multiple days and not type in the same information for each individual day for that week.

review_title: My day is so much easier now!
description: The system set up was quick and painless. Support is very prompt and responsive. This system has made my job so much easier!
author: Tanya M.
pros: Clockwise is a fairly easy to use, intuitive system. I had a brief call with the implementation team, then I was off and running! I have also found it very reliable, no glitches to speak of at all. I work for a mid-sized (300 employees) privately owned company. The system offers all the features I needed; it actually offers much more than I needed.
cons: The user training could be beefed up some. When I find myself calling support it's usually for things I don't do often (such as creating new departments and cost codes). A detailed user guide would be helpful.

author: Kathi S.
pros: We have been using this software since 2009, and have zero complaints. The best feature of this software is the compatibility with QuickBooks. I have never had any issues with downloading the time sheets. It makes my job so much easier. The staff at Clockwise area all very helpful and always available.
cons: I just have one little thing that I wish could be added or changed in the software. It would be great if the Leave Report could be downloaded into an Excel spreadsheet.

description: Accomodates day to day entry and ease of integration into Costpoint
author: Nicholas M.
pros: Ease of use. Easiest timesheet system that I have ever used in my 30 years
cons: Could be easier to setup Groups and Charge numbers

description: The QuickBooks integration was essential and easy to use.
author: Mica J.
pros: The product was easy for employees to use.
cons: We needed a more robust system to handle HR, Timekeeping, Scheduling, and Payroll.

description: We needed a software that complied with government requirements when we had a grant audit many years ago. The auditor suggested Clockwise and we have been with them ever since. Customer support has been great.
author: Jan H.
pros: The reports are fantastic and very comprehensive
cons: Very user friendly, but not as easy on the employee set-up end.

description: Overall great experience. Customer support is always responsive and willing to go the extra mile to help.
author: Janice T.
pros: The software is easy to use and easy to demonstrate to employees.
cons: Some of the report functions are difficult to use.

description: We started using Clockwise because we needed a DCAA approved time system. When we were audited the auditor said he was glad we were using this system.
author: Ann B.
pros: The software is easy to use and easy to access.
cons: Some employees would like to have a mobile app.
